headline: nVent Electric and Lululemon have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: nVent Electric is highlighted for record growth and AI-driven demand, while Lululemon faces slowing growth and margin pressure in the latest Zacks Bull and Bear outlook.

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Halliburton, Raises Price Target to $40
summary: UBS  analyst Josh Silverstein   maintains Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $39 to $40.
